name: durable-chat-relay
description: Chat prototype for field teams with unreliable connectivity, built with Vue 3, TypeScript, Express, Socket.IO, SQLite, IndexedDB recovery, helper-node sync and peer-assisted WebRTC fallback.

scripts.dev:server: NODE_ROLE=central NODE_ID=central-demo PORT=3000 DATABASE_PATH=./data/central.sqlite DCR_TRUSTED_HELPER_IDS=helper-demo DCR_HELPER_SHARED_SECRET=local-dev-helper-secret tsx server/index.ts
scripts.dev:central: NODE_ROLE=central NODE_ID=central-demo PORT=3000 DATABASE_PATH=./data/central.sqlite DCR_TRUSTED_HELPER_IDS=helper-demo DCR_HELPER_SHARED_SECRET=local-dev-helper-secret tsx server/index.ts
scripts.dev:helper: NODE_ROLE=helper PORT=3001 DATABASE_PATH=./data/helper.sqlite NODE_ID=helper-demo CENTRAL_URL=http://localhost:3000 DCR_HELPER_SHARED_SECRET=local-dev-helper-secret tsx server/index.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.helper:laravel: NODE_ROLE=helper PORT=3001 DATABASE_PATH=./data/helper.sqlite NODE_ID=helper-demo CENTRAL_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 DCR_HELPER_SHARED_SECRET=local-dev-helper-secret tsx server/index.ts
scripts.central: NODE_ROLE=central NODE_ID=central-demo PORT=3000 DATABASE_PATH=./data/central.sqlite DCR_TRUSTED_HELPER_IDS=helper-demo DCR_HELPER_SHARED_SECRET=local-dev-helper-secret tsx server/index.ts
